mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_EMAIL_FILE ( EMAIL_FILE_SEQ, FILE_GRP_SEQ, RMK, STATUS, REG_USER_SEQ, REG_DT, DEL_DT ) VALUES ( #{emailFileSeq}, #{fileGrpSeq}, #{rmk}, #{status}, #{regUserSeq}, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CONVERT(INT, #{maxDownloadDay}), GETDATE()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_EMAIL_FILE SET FILE_GRP_SEQ = #{fileGrpSeq}, RMK = #{rmk}, STATUS = #{status}, DEL_DT = DATEADD(DAY, CONVERT(INT, #{maxDownloadDay}), REG_DT) WHERE EMAIL_FILE_SEQ = #{emailFileSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT F.FILE_PATH AS filePath FROM SYS_EMAIL_FILE EF LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE F ON EF.FILE_GRP_SEQ = F.FILE_GRP_SEQ WHERE EF.EMAIL_FILE_SEQ = #{emailFileSeq} AND F.FILE_PATH IS NOT NULL AND F.FILE_PATH LIKE '%/EMAIL/%'

SELECT TOP 1 EF.FILE_GRP_SEQ AS fileGrpSeq , ISNULL(SF.DOWN_CNT, 0) AS downCnt FROM SYS_EMAIL_FILE EF LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE SF ON SF.FILE_GRP_SEQ = EF.FILE_GRP_SEQ WHERE EF.EMAIL_FILE_SEQ = #{emailFileSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_FILE SET DOWN_CNT = ISNULL(DOWN_CNT, 0) + 1 WHERE FILE_GRP_SEQ = #{fileGrpSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL_FILE_SEQ, F.FILE_PATH FROM SYS_EMAIL_FILE EMAIL_F LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE F ON EMAIL_F.FILE_GRP_SEQ = F.FILE_GRP_SEQ WHERE F.FILE_PATH LIKE '%/EMAIL/%' AND STATUS != 'FILE_DEL' AND GETDATE() >= DEL_DT
SELECT CONVERT(INT, CODE_VAL) FROM SYS_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_CD = 'SYS_EMAIL_FILE' AND CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_DW_DAY'
SELECT CONVERT(INT, CODE_VAL) FROM SYS_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_CD = 'SYS_EMAIL_FILE' AND CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_DW_CNT'

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_GB' THEN CODE_VAL END) AS mailQuota , MAX(CASE WHEN CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_DW_CNT' THEN CODE_VAL END) AS fileDownCnt , MAX(CASE WHEN CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_DW_DAY' THEN CODE_VAL END) AS downDay , dbo.getUserNm(MAX(MODI_USER_SEQ)) AS modUserNm , CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), MAX(MODI_DT), 120) AS modDt FROM SYS_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_CD = 'SYS_EMAIL_FILE' AND CODE_CD IN ('EMAIL_GB', 'EMAIL_DW_CNT', 'EMAIL_DW_DAY')
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_CODE SET CODE_VAL = #{mailQuota}, MODI_USER_SEQ = #{modiUserSeq}, MODI_DT = GETDATE() WHERE CODE_GROUP_CD = 'SYS_EMAIL_FILE' AND CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_GB'
UPDATE SYS_CODE SET CODE_VAL = #{fileDownCnt}, MODI_USER_SEQ = #{modiUserSeq}, MODI_DT = GETDATE() WHERE CODE_GROUP_CD = 'SYS_EMAIL_FILE' AND CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_DW_CNT'
UPDATE SYS_CODE SET CODE_VAL = #{downDay}, MODI_USER_SEQ = #{modiUserSeq}, MODI_DT = GETDATE() WHERE CODE_GROUP_CD = 'SYS_EMAIL_FILE' AND CODE_CD = 'EMAIL_DW_DAY'
